title: WCBS Adapter Manifest
description: Canonical source of truth for one runtime adapter. runtime_adapters/CAPABILITY_MATRIX.md is generated from these files and must never be hand-edited. Enforced by scripts/lib/adapter-contract.mjs.

support_level.description: Full: automatic native bootstrap, all essential AND all optional capabilities native. Partial: automatic bootstrap, all essential native, >=1 optional degraded/unavailable WITH an exact fallback. Manual: essential capabilities present but activation needs a per-session user action. Unsupported: an essential capability is unavailable. A file's existence does not imply any level.

native_install_mechanism.description: The platform's own plugin/extension/marketplace/hook/instruction-file mechanism. Editing a user's shell profile or unrelated global config to simulate integration is prohibited.

bootstrap_path.description: Repository-relative path. Must exist on disk.

bootstrap_mode.description: automatic = enters model context at clean-session start with no pasted prompt and no remembered command. Full and Partial require automatic.

activation_marker.description: Unique, runtime-specific marker a clean-session scenario greps for to prove WHICH adapter loaded. A shared marker proves some kit instruction loaded, not which adapter loaded.

tool_mapping_path.description: Repository-relative path. Must exist on disk.

fallbacks.description: Every capability that is not native MUST have an exact fallback here, or state that no safe fallback exists. This is what prevents an agent inventing an unsupported tool.

modifies_user_files.description: True only if files outside the project are created or modified. Must be disclosed.
